typecheck.command: npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/server/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/client/tsconfig.json

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit deviation reporting (or an explicit exception path) when UI behavior changes are validated without agent-browser, and gate `followedProcedure: true` on satisfying required-tool validation steps.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both fix-inline-editing-scrutiny and fix-keyboard-shortcuts-scrutiny reviews reported no agent-browser invocation and no interactiveChecks while handoffs still marked followedProcedure=true, despite the implementation-worker skill requiring agent-browser for UI behavior changes.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document JSDOM keyboard modifier-key nuance (empty navigator.platform causing Ctrl-vs-Cmd key handling differences) in shared user-testing guidance.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: observation appears test-runner/environment specific and is not yet broad enough to codify as shared cross-worker guidance.
